---
title: "test_cortex.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_cortex.py"
loc: 22
complexity: 1
logic_score: 4.00
style_score: 3.83
intel_score: 8.67
overall_score: 5.28
---

## Intent
The `test_cortex.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on mock_project, test_cortex_ingestion, MockBrain, __init__, add_skill, build_index. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via mock_project, test_cortex_ingestion, MockBrain, __init__, add_skill, build_index. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.7/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.core.engine.cortex](file://src.core.engine.cortex)

### Exports
- `mock_project`
- `test_cortex_ingestion`
- `MockBrain`
- `__init__`
- `add_skill`
- `build_index`
